questions.question: What is the time complexity of the merge sort algorithm, and why is it considered efficient?
questions.hint: Discuss the properties of merge sort that contribute to its efficiency

questions.question: How does the binary search algorithm work, and what are its advantages over linear search?
questions.hint: Explain the steps involved in the binary search algorithm and discuss its applications

questions.question: Describe the differences between a stack and a queue data structure. Provide an example of when you would use each.
questions.hint: Focus on the implementation and use cases of both data structures
